v_results.V4_default_off_equivalence: PASS (_robot_sequencer is None when not injected; no coco-proactive-robot-seq threads spawned)

default_off_equivalence: yes (set_robot_sequencer 未调用时 _robot_sequencer=None；_do_trigger_unlocked 末尾 if _seq is not None 守卫；main.py env-gated 块仅在 _seq_cfg.enabled and reachy_mini is not None 时 wire)
atexit_strategy: atexit.register(lambda: seq.shutdown(wait=True, timeout=2.0)) — 已在 main.py env-gated 块内注册；RobotSequencer.shutdown() 自身幂等
proactive_inject_point: coco/proactive.py:_do_trigger_unlocked emit 之后 (~line 1130+) — best-effort 异步 daemon thread 跑 seq.run([nod])，吃异常
business_subscribe_wire: coco/main.py env-gated 块内调 _robot_sequencer.subscribe(_robot_seq_business_observer)，回调 emit 'robot.seq_observed'
禁词扫描: 无命中 (set_motor_torque/enable_torque/body./low_level 在改动文件中均未出现)
notes: RobotSequencer 通过 set_robot_sequencer(seq) 注入到 ProactiveScheduler；main.py 在 ProactiveScheduler 构造后立即注入（若 sequencer 启用）
GroupModeCoordinator 注入留待后续 feature — 当前 GroupModeCoord 路径不直接驱动单次 robot 动作，更适合作为单独 backlog
Default-OFF bytewise 等价：未注入 sequencer 时 _do_trigger_unlocked 走 `with self._lock: _seq = self._robot_sequencer` → 取出 None → 不进 if 分支；与 robot-007 基线行为一致
